## Checklist

Copy from [docs/app-template-checklist.md](docs/app-template-checklist.md):

### XML
- [ ] GitHub URLs use `RapalS` (or updated for your fork)
- [ ] Required CA fields present (Name, Repository, Overview, Description, Support, Project, TemplateURL)
- [ ] Modern `<Config>` entries only (no legacy Networking/Data/Environment)
- [ ] `scripts/validate-template.ps1` passes locally

### Assets
- [ ] `<Icon>` set to a stable HTTPS PNG URL (the app's upstream raw icon)
- [ ] README template index updated

### Testing
- [ ] Tested on Unraid version: __________
- [ ] Image pull successful
- [ ] Container starts and core functionality verified
- [ ] WebUI tested (if applicable)
